title: Calrissian (disambiguation)
content:
'''Calrissian''' is the last name of:

==Canon==
*'''[[Calrissian laundry detergent]]''', a cleaning agent.
*'''[[Kadara Calrissian]]''', the daughter of [[Landonis Balthazar Calrissian]].
*'''[[Landonis Balthazar Calrissian]]''', a [[smuggler]].
*'''[[Lando Calrissian's father]]''', Lando's father.
*'''[[Landonis Balthazar Calrissian's mother]]''', Lando's mother.

==Legends==
*'''[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]''', the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] version of the character.
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] who used the alias of '''''Major Calrissian''''' in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]].
*'''[[Tendra Risant Calrissian]]''', Lando's wife.
*'''[[Lando Calrissian, Junior]]''', Lando's son.
*'''[[Mother Calrissian]]''', Lando Senior's mother.
*'''[[Lando Calrissian's father/Legends|Lando Calrissian's father]]''', Lando Senior's father.
*'''[[Galduran Calrissian]]''', a smuggler.
*'''[[Raan Calrissian]]''', a man who lived during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|de=Calrissian
}}
